principle: Retain inspectable typed artifacts and certificates, not private chain-of-thought.
valid_transformations: repository source + extractor -> repository facts + digest parity
repository facts -> authority DAG + P2 membership evidence
repository facts + dependency graph + authority DAG -> invariant hypergraph + P2 correspondence
invariant hypergraph -> spectral certificate + P1 residual verification
task + dependency graph + invariant hypergraph -> task diffusion + effect frontier
task representations -> immutable task capsule + draft experiment
capsule + predictions + clean chronology -> admitted plan
admitted plan + diff + executable checks -> evidence ledger + outcomes
valid artifacts + complete outcomes -> finished experiment transaction
prohibitions: no proof claim without claim, assumptions, semantics, certificate, verifier, and correspondence boundary
no opaque vector as self-authenticating truth
no P1 to P2/P3/P4 promotion without the missing evidence
no source edit before plan admission
no unregistered generator in an admitted transaction
no arbitrary shell string in verification commands
no private chain-of-thought retained as repository authority
